subject: fix(export): eliminate gradient banding in PDF and image exports
body:
Vignette and radial overlays looked terrible in PDF exports because:
1. 2-stop CSS gradients degrade when html-to-image serializes to canvas
2. JPEG 0.92 quality causes visible 8x8 block artifacts on smooth transitions

Fix: Multi-stop gradient helpers (linearFade, radialVignette, radialSpotlight)
with 4-6 intermediate opacity stops give the renderer precise anchor points.
Bumped PDF JPEG quality from 0.92 to 0.97 and image export from 0.92 to 0.95.

Tags: export, overlay, pdf, quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: export-quality
Semver: patch
title: eliminate gradient banding in PDF and image exports
